members.name: Abdullah Arief Ali
members.title: Head of Training @ Strategic Partners & Financial Consultant
members.bio: With over 18 years in financial services, I work at the intersection of wealth, legacy, and leadership. I specialise in Islamic and conventional estate planning, business owner succession, and complex trust and asset restructuring — helping families protect what they've built across generations. I also develop financial professionals through structured training and mentorship. I hold an MSc in Asset & Wealth Management from NTU and serve on the boards of LBKM, TAA Trust Fund, and Amal Care.

testimonials.title: My one and only trusted consultant
testimonials.body: Arief has been managing my family's financial affairs for over a decade. He knows our priorities and never recommends anything that doesn't fit who we are.
testimonials.name: Faridah H.

testimonials.title: Finally, an advisor who explained faraid properly
testimonials.body: I had questions about Islamic inheritance for years. Arief sat with me for two hours, walked through faraid, hibah, and CPF nominations — and I left with a plan.
testimonials.name: Rozana Z.

members.name: Noraziemah
members.title: Senior Financial Consultant
members.bio: I joined SOUL Advisors 8 years ago with a simple belief: that every family deserves financial security, regardless of where they start. My focus is on young families, health planning, and helping clients understand what they're buying.

testimonials.title: She made insurance make sense
testimonials.body: Sarah explained everything clearly without jargon. For the first time I actually understood what I was covered for.
testimonials.name: Marcus T.

members.name: Dzulqarnain
members.title: Financial Consultant
members.bio:
I love to travel with my bikes. :)

My clients describe me as patient, thorough, and always reachable. After 5 years in the field, I specialise in helping self-employed and gig economy workers who often fall through the cracks of conventional financial planning.
credentials: Degree in Islamic Studie Major In Hadith (Islamic University Of Madinah

testimonials.title: He gets the freelancer life
testimonials.body: As a freelancer, most advisors didn't know how to plan for irregular income. Hafiz did. He built something that actually works for me.
testimonials.name: Dani C.

members.bio:
I am a Financial Advisor and Estate Planner who helps families plan with heart and clarity. 

What began for me as a chance encounter with estate planning quickly became a mission to help others protect what truly matters to them.

Coming from a blended family, I understand the emotional weight of legacy planning. Clients value my approachable nature, depth of knowledge, and focus on purpose over pressure.

I've guided hundreds through meaningful planning conversations. I aim to always work  with integrity, faith, and a calm presence. 

Outside work, I enjoy time with my wife, coffee rituals, and model building as a form of mindfulness.
members.name: Iqbal Nikmatullah
members.title: Financial Consultant
